articles.summary: Without a clear roadmap, AI adoption often fizzles, leaving ROI unproven and teams frustrated. The 90-Day AI Adoption Playbook from You.com [4] gives you an effective, phased roadmap to move from pilot to real, measurable ROI—in only 90 days.

articles.title: Make your first 90 days count. Download the playbook.
AI CODING STARTUP CURSOR HITS $2 BILLION ANNUAL SALES RATE
articles.summary: Cursor is one of the fastest-growing startups of all time. It is less than five years old, yet its product is already ingrained in many software programmers' daily routine. The company's annualized revenue topped $2 billion in February. About 60% of the revenue is coming from corporate customers. The startup was valued at $29.3 billion in November, making it one of the most valuable AI startups in the US.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC VS. WHITE HOUSE PUTS $60 BILLION AT RISK
articles.summary: The $60 billion investment into Anthropic from over 200 venture capital investors is now at risk due to a contract dispute with the Pentagon. Anthropic being designated a supply chain risk is unprecedented. It will prevent other military contractors from deploying Claude in their applications. It could also require companies like Nvidia, which do business with the US military, to sever their commercial activities with Anthropic. The situation is becoming an existential moment for all of American AI and its investors.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC CLAUDE EXPERIENCED WIDESPREAD OUTAGE
articles.summary: Anthropic faced broad service disruptions affecting Claude.ai and Claude Code, with many users unable to log in, while the company reported that the Claude API continued operating normally.

articles.title: CHINESE AI FIRM MINIMAX MORE THAN DOUBLES REVENUE IN FIRST POST-IPO RESULTS
articles.summary: Chinese AI startup MiniMax's annual revenue soared to $79 million in 2025 from $30.5 million the previous year. Net loss widened to $1.87 billion from $465.2 million. Analysts were expecting the equivalent of about $72 million in revenue and a net loss of roughly $564 million. These are the first results published since the company went public in January. Its shares have increased more than fourfold from their IPO price, pushing the company's market capitalization past $30 billion.

articles.title: KEEPING COMMUNITY HUMAN WHILE SCALING WITH AGENTS
THE STATE OF CONSUMER AI. PART 1 - USAGE
articles.summary: AI apps have now crossed 1 billion weekly active users, with ChatGPT accounting for 900 million. ChatGPT is the only AI app with both the installed base and new user momentum to become the core utility. Its lead is even more pronounced across DAU:MAU ratios, retention, and time spent. The challenge now is to see whether the usage is deepening into genuine habit or still behaving like a utility people visit briefly and leave.

articles.title: BUILD AI EXPERIENCES YOU CAN TRUST — WITH AUDITABLE ANSWERS
articles.summary: Progress Agentic RAG [11] helps teams deploy AI search, assistants, and automation with verifiable, auditable answers. Offering 80% cost savings vs. building it yourself, it lets you use 30+ retrieval strategies and get instant swaps between 40+ LLMs — or BYO model. Answer quality is measured with REMi evaluation. >>See plans & start free

articles.title: ALIBABA'S SMALL, OPEN SOURCE QWEN3.5-9B BEATS OPENAI'S GPT-OSS-120B AND CAN RUN ON STANDARD LAPTOPS
articles.summary: Alibaba recently unveiled its Qwen3.5 Small Model Series. Qwen3.5-0.8B and 2B are intended for prototyping and deployment on edge devices where battery life is paramount. Qwen3.5-4B is a strong multimodal base for lightweight agents with a 262,144 token context window. Qwen3.5-9B is a compact reasoning model that outperforms OpenAI's open source gpt-oss-120B on key third-party benchmarks. The weights for the models are available now under Apache 2.0 licenses on Hugging Face and ModelScope.

articles.title: DIFFUSION LANGUAGE MODEL
articles.summary: dLLM consolidates training and evaluation workflows for diffusion-based language models into a single library, aiming to improve transparency and reproducibility across the development pipeline.

articles.title: JUST-IN-TIME AGENTIC MEMORY FRAMEWORK
articles.summary: GAM is a new memory system that generates optimized runtime contexts for LLM agents using a two-part design: a lightweight Memorizer and a dynamic Researcher.

articles.title: THE OTHER SIDE OF ADS IN CHATGPT: ADVERTISER PERSPECTIVE
articles.summary: This article provides details on how OpenAI's ads program works for advertisers. Some of the companies invited to trial ads in ChatGPT include Adobe, Target, Albertson, and WPP Media. Each was asked to commit to at least $200,000. The companies selected specific words that have to be prompted by users for the business to be advertised. Advertisers are managed manually.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC CEO RESPONDS TO TRUMP ORDER, PENTAGON CLASH (27 MINUTE VIDEO)
articles.summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei sat down with CBS News for an exclusive interview hours after Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth declared the company a supply chain risk to national security, which restricts military contractors from doing business with the AI giant. Amodei called the move "retaliatory and punitive," and he said Anthropic sought to draw "red lines" in the government's use of its technology because "we believe that crossing those lines is contrary to American values, and we wanted to stand up for American values."

articles.title: 25% OF AI INVESTMENTS ARE AT RISK. HERE'S WHY
articles.summary: Orgs are so focused on deploying software they forget to upskill their people. Find out how to create a culture that enables AI in this

articles.title: LLMFIT
articles.summary: llmfit is a terminal tool that right-sizes large language models to fit a system's RAM, CPU, and GPU.

articles.title: GOOGLE TESTS PROJECTS FEATURE FOR GEMINI ENTERPRISE
articles.summary: Google is testing a project feature for Gemini Enterprise that allows users to organize chats by topic and set goals for AI interactions.

articles.title: REINFORCEMENT LEARNING FOR CUDA KERNEL OPTIMIZATION
articles.summary: CUDA Agent introduced a large-scale agentic reinforcement learning system that synthesizes data, augments execution with specialized skills, and trains over long horizons to generate high-performance CUDA kernels.
